title: Joint Care Flow - Joint Care
details: Move through controlled range-of-motion work and keep breathing relaxed.
skip_adjustment: Move to the next free slot within 48 hours and lower intensity by one step.

title: Visual Mobility Routine - Recovery Focus
details: Alternate near and far focus work with controlled visual tracking drills.
skip_adjustment: Move to the next free slot within 48 hours and lower intensity by one step.

title: Post-Workout Smoothie - Protein Rebuild
details: Blend protein and hydration-supportive ingredients after higher-load training.

title: Balanced Dinner - Metabolic Support
details: Build dinner around vegetables, legumes, and a moderate portion of lean protein.

title: Recovery Magnesium Dose - Travel-Safe Pack
details: Take magnesium in the evening and monitor any effect on sleep readiness.

title: Planned Injection Window - Maintenance Cycle
details: Administer the weekly medication during a stable routine window and record the site used.

title: Recovery Boot Session - Inflammation Support

title: Thermal Session - Inflammation Support
details: Use a moderate-duration heat exposure and cool down gradually afterwards.

title: Primary Care Review - Follow-Up
details: Review symptoms, medication adherence, and recent health trends with the physician.

title: Lab Testing Appointment - Follow-Up
